<!--
Thanks for opening a PR against Lenny.

Note: Lenny is in the design phase. Large code contributions against core platform
components open up once the first working slice lands (see CONTRIBUTING.md and
ROADMAP.md). Small fixes — typos, broken links, documentation — are welcome any time.
-->

## What

A concise summary of the change.

## Why

The motivation. Link the issue, discussion, or ADR that prompted this change.

Closes #

## How

Implementation approach and any notable design decisions. Call out anything a reviewer should pay extra attention to.

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual verification steps:

## Breaking changes

Does this change behavior in a backward-incompatible way? If so, describe the migration path.

## Checklist

- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) per the [DCO](https://developercertificate.org/)
- [ ] Documentation updated for any user-facing behavior change
- [ ] `make lint` passes (once the build is wired up)
- [ ] `make test` passes (once the build is wired up)
